ProShares Launches IQMM, the First Money Market ETF for the GENIUS Act

overview.description: The ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF (IQMM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively invests in US Treasury bills, notes or bonds maturing in or less than 93 days, aiming to adhere to the GENIUS Act requirements. IQMM was launched on Feb 17, 2026 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches IQMM, the First Money Market ETF for the GENIUS Act
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares today launched the ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF (IQMM), the first money market ETF to meet the requirements of the GENIUS Act.
